name: Secom Joshinetsu Co., Ltd.
summary: Secom Joshinetsu Co., Ltd. engages in the security, medical, general electric work, and construction businesses in Japan. It offers online security systems, including sensors and controllers that detect intrusions, fires, etc., as well as for use in the office buildings, factories, stores, ATM corners of financial institutions, and condominiums. The company also provides security services that the security guards dispatched to contractors to manage security at various facilities, such as office buildings, shopping malls, and factories; and crowd control services to guide people and cars at events and festivals to prevent accidents, as well as cash transportation services. In addition, it offers safety products, such as surveillance camera and access control systems, as well as home care related services. The company was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Niigata, Japan. Secom Joshinetsu Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Secom Co., Ltd.
